text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Thanks for inviting me out here. I needed
a break.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've had so much on my mind recently that it's
been affecting my performance.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Things like the most effective way to prepare for
my next race or if I'm working hard enough on my
winning equation...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of equations, I wonder if Ticket was
able to use the one I taught her the other day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And where's that Taishin? I haven't seen her this
morning. Oh, I hope she isn't laid up in bed
because she overworked herself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Anxious as ever, I see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If you think I'm playing hooky, I'm not. I'm just
taking a breather before the student council
meeting starts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence. We came here to take a
break too.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we all pay a visit to the shrine
together?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That would be wonder—oh, but Brian has a
meeting soon. Maybe we shouldn't bother her...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's no skin off my back. I still have time before I
have to go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thanks so much, you two. This will be a
nice little break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The three of us pray at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's so funny?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Nothing... Praying here with you just reminds me
of that one time when we were younger.

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What did you pray for this year, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
I prayed to become as fast as you! What'd you
pray for?

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I prayed that we'll always be able to race
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That was forever ago. I don't remember anything
like that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I still remember like it was yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It was. I'm glad I was able to remember my wish
too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're so simple sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that with this little outing, Biwa
Hayahide is feeling better than ever!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... This is no good. The more I try not to
think about it, the more I do!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't waste your breath. There's no stopping her
once she starts spiraling.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian! I worry about you too, you know!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I constantly worry about how you're doing in
school and if you're eating and resting properl—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Don't you run away! You come back here
and listen to me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to run away! I have a student
council meeting, remember?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This shrine visit doesn't end up helping Biwa
Hayahide relax at all...
